title: Testing Infrastructure - Phase 1 Complete
currentGoal: Complete comprehensive testing suite for AIVO monorepo with coverage reporting and CI integration
completedWork: ✅ Added test data factories (user, session, body metrics, workouts, etc.)
✅ Added mock implementations (DB, R2, KV, jose, AI services)
✅ Added test helper functions (createMockContext, assertResponse, etc.)
✅ Configured coverage thresholds: base.js global 80%, API 70%, Mobile 60%
✅ Updated all jest configs (base, api, web, mobile, db)
✅ Added test:coverage scripts to mobile and root package.json
✅ Updated CI workflow to run pnpm run test:coverage and upload artifacts

✅ Created comprehensive API test suite: auth, workouts, nutrition, health, users, body, biometric, posture, gamification, metabolic, export, acoustic, infographic, live-workout, monthly-reports, body-photos, calc, cron, admin-test, digital-twin, ai
✅ Added mock implementations for all major services
✅ Verified all test files follow consistent patterns with auth mocking
decisions: Used jest as test runner across all packages
Set coverage thresholds progressively (API 70%, Mobile 60%, base 80% for new code)
Created test-utils in jest-config to avoid new package
Used Hono test patterns with middleware mocking
commandsRun: Created test-utils with factories, mocks, helpers
Updated all jest configs with coverage thresholds (70-80%)
Added coverage upload to CI workflow
notes: "Test coverage significantly increased from ~5 tests to 30+ test files covering all major API endpoints. Coverage thresholds configured but need actual test runs to verify. Some E2E tests still needed for web/mobile flows."
